quote: The obstacle is the way.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: You have power over your mind—not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
author: Seneca

quote: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
author: Seneca

quote: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quote: Become who you are.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quote: No man ever steps in the same river twice.
author: Heraclitus

quote: What we think, we become.
author: Buddha

quote: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
author: Buddha

quote: Wherever you go, go with all your heart.
author: Confucius

quote: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
author: Confucius

quote: The future depends on what you do today.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
author: Peter Drucker

quote: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: Happiness depends upon ourselves.
author: Aristotle

quote: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
author: Aristotle

quote: The meaning of life is to give life meaning.
author: Viktor Frankl

quote: Between stimulus and response there is a space. In that space is our power to choose our response.
author: Viktor Frankl

quote: And now that you don't have to be perfect, you can be good.
author: John Steinbeck

quote: To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
author: Oprah Winfrey

quote: Do not watch the clock. Do what it does. Keep going.
author: Sam Levenson
